## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Mindr (fwd.digital) and GrowthX (Intoxalock) to discuss content strategy and production progress.](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is behind schedule, with Week 4 topics being discussed while Week 1 and 2 content is still in review](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [Legal review process needs streamlining; exploring Jira integration for better tracking and communication](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [DUI.org content is the current priority, with a focus on long-tail keywords to build authority before targeting more competitive terms](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Team is working on solutions to efficiently update factual information across multiple articles as data changes](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Status and Priorities

  - [9 articles submitted for approval from Week 1](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [3 calibration articles (one for each state) completed](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Week 2 has 11 new articles and 10 content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [Week 3 has 11 content refreshes from DUI.org and 1 new topic](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [Week 4 will have 15 new articles due to no more content refreshes needed for DUI.org](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [Total of 27 topics awaiting review/approval](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)

### Legal Review Process Improvement

  - [Exploring Jira integration to streamline communication between content team and legal reviewers](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [New part-time legal reviewer joining soon to help with content backlog](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Team discussing ways to tag or track factual information in articles for easier updates](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)

### Content Strategy for DUI.org

  - [Focusing on long-tail keywords initially to build authority](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Planning to create topic clusters with internal linking to improve rankings](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Aiming for top 3 rankings for targeted keywords](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Balancing specific, niche topics with broader, high-volume searches](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)

### Challenges in Content Updates

  - [Discussing solutions for efficiently updating factual information (e.g., number of service locations) across multiple articles](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [Considering creating a database of facts used in articles for easier tracking and updating](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)

### Content Types and Legal Sensitivity

  - [Identifying content types that may require less intensive legal review (e.g., mental health topics, how-to guides)](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [Noting sensitive topics like insurance and lawyer listings that require careful handling](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
  - [Discussing approach to celebrity DUI content and when it's appropriate to cover](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)

### AI and Content Creation

  - [Team making progress on using AI to digest state-specific DUI information](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [Working on improving AI's understanding of complex legal diagrams and information](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Brian to prioritize topic approvals for new content](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=2144.0)
  - [Team to focus on DUI.org content as the main priority](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=2144.0)
  - [Prateek to continue working on Week 2 articles and content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [Brian to provide state-level sources for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [Explore solutions for efficient fact-tracking and updating across articles](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [Investigate potential Jira integration for legal review process](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Prateek to research AI improvements for digesting complex legal information](https://fathom.video/share/SGr1fAWUBqCCY3xpFTWWevRi5YDLRLTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
